content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Create a long novel with structured settings by populating the scaffolded directory with content based on owner input.</objective>
<constraints>Must follow the scaffolded directory structure. Content must be consistent across files.</constraints>
<assumptions>The owner will provide specific details for premise, characters, setting, plot, and style.</assumptions>
<risks>Owner may provide insufficient detail; content may become inconsistent.</risks>
<steps>1. Define the plan to gather information. 2. Ask owner for specific story details. 3. Populate the scaffolded files with the provided information. 4. Verify the structure and content consistency.</steps>
<checks>Scaffold exists, files are populated, content is consistent, audit passes.</checks>
<paths>stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings</paths>
<reason>The scaffold is created, but no content exists. I need a plan to transition from a structure-only state to a content-populated state.</reason>
</action>
